description: RAG Web Browser Worker - Search Google and extract web page content for LLM processing

properties.title: Search term or URL
properties.name: query
properties.description: Enter Google Search keywords or a URL of a specific web page

properties.title: Maximum results
properties.name: maxResults
properties.description: Maximum number of search results to extract (1-100)

properties.title: Output formats
properties.name: outputFormats
properties.description: Select output formats for extracted content

properties.title: Scraping tool
properties.name: scrapingTool
properties.description: Select scraping tool for extracting web pages

properties.title: Request timeout (seconds)
properties.name: requestTimeoutSecs
properties.description: Maximum time in seconds for the request
